info.name: 3rdAi
info.description: API collection for Mobile User & Partner Registration, Login, Chat, and all related flows.

item.description: Publicly accessible APIs that do not require authentication.
item.name: ?? Public APIs

request.description: Get list of active organizations with City and Organization name combined in the label. Used for the Select Organization dropdown on login and register pages.
Step 1: User provides email + password. OTP is sent to the email.
Step 1 Verify: Verify the OTP sent to email.
Step 2: Send OTP to mobile number. otpMethod: gupshup | twilio | whatsapp
Step 2 Verify: Verify the OTP sent to mobile.
Step 3: Complete profile. Returns JWT token on success.
Step 4 (Optional): Upload profile picture. Requires JWT token from Step 3.
Resend OTP to email if it expired.
Resend OTP to mobile if it expired.
Sign in or register via Google. If user is fully registered (step 3), returns JWT token. Otherwise continues registration flow.
Login with email and password. Returns token_user JWT. Also returns clientId, clientName, and organizationName for the app to use.
Get currently logged-in user's profile. Returns full user data along with clientId, clientName, and organizationName.
Initiate password reset. Sends OTP to registered email.
Verify the OTP received for password reset.
Reset password using the verified OTP.

item.name: ?? User - Report a Case
item.description: APIs for citizen to submit cases with GPS auto-routing, track case status, and manage notifications.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Snatching near Metro Pillar 12",
  "priority": "high",
  "latitude": 28.5672,
  "longitude": 77.2100,
  "formData": {
    "type": "snatching",
    "location": "Near Metro Pillar 12, Lajpat Nagar",
    "dateTime": "2026-03-01T10:30:00",
    "description": "Chain snatching incident near metro station by two men on bike",
    "isAnonymous": false,
    "snatchingType": "Chain",
    "itemStolen": "Gold Chain",
    "estimatedValue": "25000",
    "numberOfAttackers": "2",
    "weaponUsed": "No",
    "vehicleUsed": "Bike",
    "injuryHappened": "No"
  }
}

request.description: Citizen submits a case with GPS coordinates. Backend uses $geoIntersects to find the matching Area polygon ? auto-inherits clientId + assignedPartnerId + areaId. formData.type must be one of: snatching | theft | harassment | accident | robbery | camera_issue | unidentified_emergency. Token: token_user (from User Login).
Get all cases reported by the logged-in citizen. type=USER filter is auto-applied. Response includes status, timeline (full history), assignedPartnerId, and location. Token: token_user.

Get full detail of a single reported case. Includes timeline (status history), metadata (original form data), and GPS location. Replace REPLACE_WITH_ALERT_ID with _id from API 2 response. Token: token_user.

Get all notifications for the logged-in citizen. When a partner updates a case status, a notification is auto-created for the citizen. type=case_update notifications contain alertId in the data field. Token: token_user.
Mark a single notification as read. Replace REPLACE_WITH_NOTIFICATION_ID with _id from API 4 response. Sets isRead=true and records readAt timestamp. Token: token_user.
Mark all notifications as read in one go. Useful for the 'Mark All Read' button in the notifications screen. Token: token_user.

item.name: ?? Partner - Registration
item.description: Partner 4-step registration flow: Step1=Email OTP ? Step2=Phone OTP ? Step3=Profile (returns reg_token) ? Step4=Profile Picture Upload (R2). After Step4, account is pending approval from Client/Admin.

request.description: Step 1: Partner submits email + password. OTP is sent to email.
Step 1 Verify: Verify the email OTP.
Step 2: Send OTP to phone number. otpMethod: gupshup | twilio | whatsapp
Step 2 Verify: Verify the OTP sent to phone. Body: email + otp + clientId (phone NOT required here).

Step 3: Complete partner profile (name, designation, policeId, area, state, experience). ? Returns JWT registration token (partner_reg_token) — save this, it is needed for Step 4. Partner isActive=false at this point, waiting for admin approval.

header.description: JWT token received from Step 3 response (data.token). Save it as Postman variable: partner_reg_token

formdata.description: Profile photo (JPG/PNG/WEBP, max 5MB). Field name must be 'image'.

request.description: Step 4: Upload profile picture to Cloudflare R2. Requires JWT token from Step 3 (save as {{partner_reg_token}}). FIXED: Partner isActive=false is now allowed in middleware during registration. R2 key stored as: images/partner/{id}/profile/{uuid}.jpg. DB: profilePicture=key, profilePictureKey=key. Response includes presigned URL for immediate display. After this, partner is pending Client/Admin approval.
Resend OTP to partner email if it expired during Step 1.
Resend OTP to partner phone if expired during Step 2. otpMethod: gupshup | twilio | whatsapp
Alternative to Step 1 Email OTP — use Google OAuth to skip email OTP. Goes directly to Step 2 (Phone OTP). Returns registrationComplete=true if partner is already fully registered.

Partner login. Returns token_partner. Also returns success message and data object containing partner details, token, clientId, clientName, and organizationName. Will fail if verificationStatus is 'pending' or 'rejected'.

Poll this on the WaitingApproval screen (every 30 sec) to detect approval. No auth required. UPDATED RESPONSE: When verificationStatus='approved', response now includes: data.token (JWT token_partner), data.partner (full profile), clientId, clientName, and organizationName. Frontend should save token_partner + partner_data + organization info to localStorage and redirect directly to /partner/dashboard — NO re-login needed! Pending response: { verificationStatus: 'pending', name }. Rejected response: { verificationStatus: 'rejected', blockedReason }.
Login partner via Google OAuth. Returns JWT token_partner, data.partner, clientId, clientName, and organizationName on success.

item.name: ?? Partner - Citizen Reports
item.description: APIs for partner to view geo-routed citizen cases, update case status through strict 5-step flow, filter by status, and pick up unassigned cases. STATUS FLOW: Reported -> Under Review -> Verified -> Action Taken -> Resolved. Rejected is allowed only from Under Review or Verified.

query.description: USER = Citizen Reports | CLIENT = Device Alerts
Optional: Reported | Under Review | Verified | Action Taken | Resolved | Rejected
Optional: true = also show unassigned cases from same client

request.description: Get all citizen cases geo-routed and assigned to this partner (assignedPartnerId = logged-in partner). Response includes: alerts[], total, newCount (cases in last 24h), hasMore (pagination), statusCounts (breakdown by status). type=USER is required for citizen reports. Token: {{token_partner}} (from Partner Login API).

Get full detail of a single citizen case. Response includes: (1) alert  full case data with timeline history and GPS location, (2) allowedNextStatuses  which status transitions are valid from current status, (3) availableBasisTypes  valid basisType options for this case's category. CALL THIS BEFORE calling Update Status APIs (4-8) to know what to send. Replace REPLACE_WITH_ALERT_ID with _id from API 1 response. Token: {{token_partner}}.

query.description: Valid values: robbery | unidentified_emergency | snatching | theft | harassment | accident | camera_issue. Omit to get all categories.

request.description: Get valid basisType options for a specific case category. Each category has its own set of basis types  you MUST use a value from this list in the basisType field of Update Status APIs (4-8). If ?category param is omitted, returns all categories and all their basis types at once. Token: {{token_partner}}.

STEP 1 of 4  Transition: Reported  Under Review. This is the FIRST action partner takes when they start investigating a case. Fields: status (required) = 'Under Review', basisType (required) = a valid string from API 3 for this case category, description (required) = min 20 characters detail note. On success: citizen gets auto push notification. If partner was not previously assigned, they get auto-assigned to this case. Token: {{token_partner}}.

STEP 2 of 4  Transition: Under Review  Verified. Use this after investigation confirms the incident is genuine and evidence has been gathered. The case has been reviewed and facts are confirmed  now moving toward action. Prerequisite: case must be in 'Under Review' status. basisType must be from API 3 for this case's category. description min 20 characters. Token: {{token_partner}}.

STEP 3 of 4  Transition: Verified  Action Taken. Use this when concrete action has been taken on the verified case (suspect arrested, FIR filed, item recovered, etc.). Prerequisite: case must be in 'Verified' status. basisType must be from API 3 for this case's category. description min 20 characters. Token: {{token_partner}}.

STEP 4 of 4  Transition: Action Taken  Resolved. TERMINAL STATUS  Case is fully closed after resolution. isActive is set to false automatically. Citizen gets final notification. This status CANNOT be changed after setting. Prerequisite: case must be in 'Action Taken' status. basisType must be from API 3. description min 20 characters. Token: {{token_partner}}.

item.name: 8. Update Status  Rejected  (From Under Review or Verified)

request.description: TERMINAL STATUS  Transition: Under Review  Rejected OR Verified  Rejected. Use this when the reported case is found to be false, duplicate, or unsubstantiated. isActive is set to false automatically. Citizen gets a rejection notification. This status CANNOT be changed after setting. Allowed ONLY from 'Under Review' or 'Verified'  NOT from 'Reported' or 'Action Taken'. basisType must be from API 3. description min 20 characters (explain why rejected). Token: {{token_partner}}.

query.description: true = show MY assigned cases + unassigned cases from same client. false = show only MY cases.

request.description: Get citizen cases that have NOT been assigned to any partner yet (assignedPartnerId = null) from the same client's organization, along with own assigned cases. Useful when a partner wants to pick up an unassigned case from their area. Uses OR query: assignedPartnerId = self OR (clientId = same & assignedPartnerId = null). To self-assign an unassigned case, just call Update Status API (4)  partner gets auto-assigned on first status update. Token: {{token_partner}}.

query.description: Filter by status. Valid values: Reported | Under Review | Verified | Action Taken | Resolved | Rejected
Optional filter: low | medium | high | critical

request.description: Filter assigned citizen cases by a specific status. Change the ?status= value to see cases at different stages. Useful for dashboard tabs like 'New Cases' (Reported), 'In Progress' (Under Review / Verified / Action Taken), 'Closed' (Resolved / Rejected). Combine with ?priority=high to see urgent pending cases. All valid statuses: Reported | Under Review | Verified | Action Taken | Resolved | Rejected. Token: {{token_partner}}.
Get the logged-in partner's profile details. Returns partner data along with clientId, clientName, and organizationName.
Update partner profile. Optionally upload a new profile image via formdata.
Update profile picture for an existing (approved) partner.

item.name: ?? Partner - Chat Management
item.description: APIs for partner to manage online status, requests, and conversations

request.description: Update partner's online status. Values: online | offline | busy
Get partner's current online status and conversation count.
Get all pending conversation requests from users waiting to chat.
Accept a user's conversation request. Partner can accept if under max conversation limit.
Reject a user's conversation request.
Get all conversations (accepted/active/ended) for the partner.
Get messages for a specific conversation. Use page & limit for pagination.
Get all partners with pending verification status (for admin/client approval screen).
Get all partners (all statuses) for admin/client.
Approve a partner to enable their login. Sets verificationStatus to 'approved'.
Reject a partner with an optional reason.

item.name: ?? AI Chat (User/Partner/Client)
item.description: AI-powered chat APIs. All roles (user, partner, client) can use these.

request.description: Create a new AI chat session. Works for user, partner, and client roles.
Get all AI chat sessions for the logged-in user/partner/client.
Get a specific AI chat with all its messages.
Send a message and get AI response (OpenAI or Gemini based on admin settings).
Delete an AI chat session.
Debug endpoint to check token role, user ID and access. Useful for troubleshooting auth issues.

item.name: ?? User?Partner Real-time Chat
item.description: APIs for user-side of Partner chat (find partners, create conversation requests, messages)

request.description: Get list of verified + active partners available for consultation.
Get full details of a specific partner (for profile display in chat sidebar).
User creates a consultation request with a partner. Status starts as 'pending' until partner accepts.
Get all conversations for the logged-in user (pending/accepted/active/ended).
Get messages for a conversation. Conversation must be in accepted/active state.

item.name: 📁 Mobile - Case Management
item.description: APIs specific to mobile apps for dynamic form generation, case creation, and tracking.

request.description: Returns a list of all available case types for rendering UI cards.
Returns the dynamic form layout required for a specific case category (e.g., snatching, robbery).

body.raw:
{
    "caseType": "snatching",
    "incidentTitle": "Chain snatched outside station",
    "description": "Two men on a black bike snatched a gold chain...",
    "location": "Andheri East Station",
    "latitude": 19.1136,
    "longitude": 72.8697,
    "dateTime": "2023-10-15T08:30:00",
    "snatchingType": "Chain",
    "itemStolen": "20g Gold Chain",
    "vehicleUsed": "Bike",
    "numberOfAttackers": 2,
    "weaponUsed": "No"
}

request.description: Report a new incident from the mobile app.
Upload photos/videos for a specific case.
Retrieve a list of cases reported by the authenticated user.
Fetch all details and metadata for a specific user case.
Retrieve the step-by-step progress tracking timeline.

variable.description: Backend base URL. Change to production URL when needed.
Replace with actual Client ID (e.g. CLI-ABC123)
